mapper.select: SELECT sms_seq, sms_clc, cb_num, src_num, sms_kind, filter_kind, spam_word, prv_kind, sms_leng, sms_msg, cb_url, cust_num, image_file_name, spam_pattern1, spam_pattern2, spam_pattern3, tel_id, msg_origination FROM customer_spam_message WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID} ORDER BY sms_clc DESC LIMIT #{maxMsgCnt}

SELECT spam_seq, message_id, user_id, message_type, sender, preview, deleted_yn, received_at, expire_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_spam_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND message_id = #{messageId}
